subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! Hearken unto the voice of the Wronged One, Who calleth thee from the most glorious station and summoneth thee unto the ocean of divine mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود بشنو ندای مظلوم را که از مقام محمود ترا ندا میفرماید و بدریای رحمت الهی
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @prophecy and fulfillment
